pending.description:
$1 Vs $1,000,000 WATERSLIDE IN GTA 5 !!

I tried one of the most impossible GTA V Mega Ramp challenges using Sonic mod + Franklin and the results were insane. Watch till the end because this spiral parkour gets more difficult every second!

In this GTA 5 gameplay, we test out extreme stunts, impossible ramps, and mega ramp tricks with high-speed modded characters.
More insane GTA 5 videos coming soon — subscribe and join the journey!
